description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI recaps a big 2025 for developers, highlighting major progress in reasoning, Codex as a coding surface, real multimodality, agent-native building blocks, and open-weight models, with sharp benchmark gains across the year.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - GPT-5.1-Codex-Max is now available in the API
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI releases GPT-5.1-Codex-Max in the API and coding tools, bringing faster, smarter, more efficient agentic coding.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Enhanced Prompt Management
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI launches Prompts as a first-class, versioned resource for reusable prompt configuration, with API access, template variables, tighter integration with Evals and Logs, and a revamped Playground plus new Optimize tool.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Introducing support for remote MCP servers, image generation, Code Interpreter, and more in the Responses API
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI adds major Responses API upgrades, including Model Context Protocol support, image generation as a tool, Code Interpreter, and file search for reasoning models. It also brings background mode, reasoning summaries, and encrypted reasoning items for smoother multi-tool workflows.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - New tools for building agents: Responses API, web search, file search, computer use, and Agents SDK
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI releases new agent-building tools, led by the Responses API, to simplify orchestration and tool use. It adds web search, file search, computer use, and the open source Agents SDK to help developers build, scale, and observe agentic apps.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Agentic Commerce Protocol — accept e-commerce orders directly through ChatGPT
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI introduces the Agentic Commerce Protocol for programmatic commerce flows and Instant Checkout in ChatGPT.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - DevDay 2025: Apps SDK, Sora 2, GPT-5 Pro, AgentKit, new image generation and speech-to-speech mini models, and more
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI releases a broad platform update with Apps in ChatGPT preview, new AgentKit tools for building and optimizing agentic workflows, Sora 2 models in the API, GPT-5 Pro in the API, Codex GA, cheaper mini models, and a new service health dashboard with faster GPT-5 priority processing.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Upgrades to Codex — gpt-5-codex
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI releases GPT-5-Codex, bringing agentic coding improvements to Codex across terminal, IDE, web, GitHub, and ChatGPT iOS.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Direct PDF file input now supported in the API
description:
2026-05-26

OpenAI now supports direct PDF uploads in the Responses and Chat Completions APIs for text and image extraction.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Project Glasswing: An initial update
description:
2026-05-23

Anthropic expands Project Glasswing with Claude Security in public beta and new cyber verification tools for eligible security teams, helping scan codebases, triage vulnerabilities, and generate fixes while sharing research and support for open-source defenders.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
description:
2026-05-20

OpenAI strengthens AI content provenance with C2PA conformance, SynthID watermarking for images, and a preview of a public verification tool that checks whether images were generated with OpenAI tools and surfaces Content Credentials when available.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 20 · May 11–15, 2026
description:
2026-05-20

Claude Code adds agent view to monitor every session from one screen, introduces goal mode that keeps working until a condition is met, and makes fast mode run on Opus 4.7 by default for quicker iteration and debugging.

title: Anthropic: Claude - New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
description:
2026-05-20

Claude adds Managed Agents support for self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels, bringing agent execution and private service access inside enterprise boundaries with stronger security and runtime control. The update is in public beta and research preview for teams building secure agents.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Code w/ Claude SF 2026 recap: Building on the AI exponential
description:
2026-05-16

Claude expands its developer platform with higher Claude Code and Opus API limits plus new Claude Managed Agents capabilities, including dreaming, multiagent orchestration, outcomes, and webhooks. The release also puts Code w/ Claude keynote and breakout recordings on YouTube.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
description:
2026-05-16

OpenAI releases a preview of a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S., letting people securely connect accounts, see a money dashboard, and ask questions grounded in their financial context on web and iOS.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
description:
2026-05-15

OpenAI improves ChatGPT safety in sensitive conversations with better recognition of emerging risk over time, including new safety summaries across chats. The updates help the model de-escalate, refuse harmful details, and respond more carefully in high-risk suicide, self-harm, and harm-to-others cases.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
description:
2026-05-15

OpenAI introduces a new Codex sandbox for Windows, bringing safer agentic coding with an elevated design, dedicated setup and runner binaries, firewall-backed network blocking, and tighter file-write controls for Windows users.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - OpenAI launches the OpenAI Deployment Company to help businesses build around intelligence
description:
2026-05-15

OpenAI launches the OpenAI Deployment Company to help organizations build and deploy reliable AI systems, backed by new Forward Deployed Engineers and a major Tomoro acquisition to speed enterprise AI deployment and operational impact.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
description:
2026-05-15

OpenAI launches GPT-5.5-Cyber in limited preview and expands Trusted Access for Cyber, giving verified defenders more permissive tools for authorized security workflows like vulnerability triage, malware analysis, red teaming, and patch validation.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Work with Codex from anywhere
description:
2026-05-15

OpenAI adds Codex to the ChatGPT mobile app in preview, giving users a full mobile way to review work, approve commands, steer threads, and stay connected to active coding tasks from anywhere. It also expands remote SSH, hooks, access tokens, and HIPAA support for enterprise teams.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports cross-account access for Amazon Athena data sources
description:
2026-05-15

Amazon Quicksight adds cross-account access for Amazon Athena data sources, letting users query Athena data in other AWS accounts through IAM role chaining. The launch also bills query costs to the data-owning account and supports multiple consumer roles for finer access segregation.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now integrates with New Relic for observability-driven AI agents
description:
2026-05-14

Amazon Quicksight adds a New Relic AI agents integration that lets teams investigate incidents, generate RCA briefs, and create tracked tasks from chat. It also supports alert insights, log and transaction analysis, natural language NRQL queries, and automated triage workflows in Quick Flows.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Introducing Claude for Small Business
description:
2026-05-13

Anthropic launches Claude for Small Business, bringing Claude into tools like QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, Docusign, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365 with ready-to-run workflows for payroll, invoicing, sales, marketing, and month-end close.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude for the legal industry
description:
2026-05-13

Claude releases 20+ new legal MCP connectors and 12 practice-area plugins, expanding how law firms and in-house teams work across research, contracts, discovery, matter management, and legal aid. The update brings deeper workflow support, open customization, and broader access to connected legal tools.

title: OpenAI: Chatgpt MacOS App - Feb 13, 2026
description:
2026-05-12

Chatgpt MacOS App fixes and improves security by phasing out certificate pinning exceptions.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Agent view in Claude Code
description:
2026-05-12

Claude adds agent view in Claude Code, a new way to manage multiple sessions from one CLI view. Users can start agents, send them to the background, peek at status and last responses, and jump back into sessions only when input is needed.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS
description:
2026-05-11

Claude releases the Claude Platform on AWS, bringing the full Claude API feature set to AWS customers with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. It adds managed agents, code execution, web tools, skills, prompt caching, and new models, all available today.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 19 · May 4–8, 2026
description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code adds zip and URL plugin loading, cross-project Ctrl+R history search, new worktree branching controls, and hard deny rules for auto mode, while also improving hooks, session handling, and reliability.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 18 · April 27 – May 1, 2026
description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code ships broad quality-of-life upgrades for Windows and login, plus faster project cleanup and resume-by-PR URL. The release also adds PowerShell support without Git Bash, new CLI and plugin tools, stronger MCP handling, and memory leak fixes.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook
description:
2026-05-09

Claude releases Microsoft 365 add-ins for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word in general availability, with Outlook now in public beta for paid plans. It keeps conversation context across apps, syncs edits between open files, and brings inbox triage and draft replies into Outlook.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
description:
2026-05-07

OpenAI releases new realtime voice models in the API, adding GPT-Realtime-2 for smarter live voice reasoning, GPT-Realtime-Translate for real-time multilingual speech, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper for streaming transcription.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
description:
2026-05-07

Anthropic expands Claude Code and Claude API usage limits, doubling Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise rate limits, removing peak-hour reductions for Pro and Max, and raising Opus API limits as new SpaceX compute capacity boosts availability for heavy users.

title: Anthropic: Claude - New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration
description:
2026-05-06

Claude launches dreaming for Managed Agents in research preview, adding self-improving memory that reviews past sessions for patterns. It also expands developers’ toolkit with outcomes, multiagent orchestration, webhooks, and public beta access to help agents handle complex tasks with less steering.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
description:
2026-05-06

OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, broader partner access, CPC bidding, and new measurement tools. Businesses can now buy, manage, and track campaigns more flexibly while OpenAI keeps ads separate from answers and user conversations private.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - GPT‑5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
description:
2026-05-06

OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPT’s default model, bringing smarter, more accurate, and more concise answers with better personalization from past chats, files, and Gmail. It also adds memory sources for clearer visibility and control over how context shapes responses.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Agents for financial services
description:
2026-05-06

Anthropic adds ready-to-run finance agent templates, Microsoft 365 add-ins for Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook coming soon, plus new partner connectors and a Moody’s MCP app to bring Claude into financial workflows.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick generates dashboards from natural language prompts
description:
2026-05-05

Amazon Quicksight now generates dashboards from natural language prompts with Generate Analysis, turning ideas into editable sheets, visuals, filters, and calculated fields. It is generally available in all AWS Regions where Amazon Quick is available.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude Security is now in public beta
description:
2026-05-05

Claude releases Claude Security in public beta for Claude Enterprise customers, bringing code vulnerability scanning and proposed fixes with Opus 4.7. The update also adds scheduled scans, targeted scans, better triage tracking, and easier exports and workflow integrations.

title: Anthropic: Claude - New connectors in Claude for everyday life
description:
2026-05-05

Claude expands connectors beyond work tools, now supporting apps like AllTrails, Instacart, Audible, Tripadvisor, Uber, Spotify and more. It also improves how connectors surface in chats, suggesting the right app in context and letting users stay in the conversation while they search, plan, and act.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds Memory for Managed Agents in public beta, giving agents cross-session learning with filesystem-based memories, API control, audit logs, and portable stores for enterprise teams building long-running agents.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents
description:
2026-05-05

Claude releases a redesigned Claude Code desktop app for running more tasks in parallel, with a new session sidebar, drag-and-drop workspace, integrated terminal and file editor, faster diffs, expanded previews, SSH support on Mac, and performance and reliability improvements.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Introducing routines in Claude Code
description:
2026-05-05

Claude introduces routines in Claude Code, a research preview that lets developers automate tasks on a schedule, by API call, or from GitHub events. Routines run on Claude Code’s web infrastructure and are available now for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users.

title: Anthropic: Claude - The advisor strategy: Give agents an intelligence boost
description:
2026-05-05

Claude introduces the advisor tool in beta, letting Sonnet or Haiku act as an executor while Opus provides guidance on demand. The result is near Opus-level agent intelligence at lower cost, with built-in spend controls and support for existing tools in a single Messages API request.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Making Claude Cowork ready for enterprise
description:
2026-05-05

Claude releases Claude Cowork generally available on all paid plans and adds organization controls for company-wide deployment, including role-based access, group spend limits, richer analytics, expanded OpenTelemetry, and Zoom connector support for team workflows.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster
description:
2026-05-05

Claude launches Managed Agents, a public beta suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale. It brings secure sandboxing, long-running sessions, scoped permissions, tracing, and faster production-ready agent development on the Claude Platform.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Audit Claude Platform activity with the Compliance API
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds the Compliance API on the Claude Platform, giving admins programmatic access to organization-wide audit logs. Security and compliance teams can track user activity, monitor configuration changes, and connect Claude usage data to existing compliance systems.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Auto mode for Claude Code
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds auto mode for Claude Code, a safer long-running permissions option that lets Claude make decisions with safeguards and fewer interruptions. It’s in research preview for Team users now, with Enterprise and API rollout coming soon, and works with Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Put Claude to work on your computer
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds computer use in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, letting it point, click, browse, open files, and run dev tools on your computer in research preview. It also expands Dispatch, so subscribers can hand off tasks from phone or desktop with built-in safety controls.

title: Anthropic: Claude - 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds full 1M context access for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 at standard pricing, with no long-context premium and higher rate limits across the window. It also expands media support to 600 images or PDF pages and rolls out automatic 1M context in Claude Code for eligible users.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds beta inline visuals in chat, bringing real-time charts, diagrams, and interactive visualizations that can change as conversations evolve. The feature is on by default and available on all plan types, including Claude Cowork on paid plans.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Bringing Code Review to Claude Code
description:
2026-05-05

Claude launches Code Review, a research preview for Team and Enterprise that sends multi-agent reviews on every PR to catch bugs, rank severity, and surface high-signal comments. It adds deeper review coverage with spend controls and analytics.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Improving skill-creator: Test, measure, and refine Agent Skills
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds skill-creator enhancements for writing evals, running benchmarks, and improving skill reliability as models evolve. The update brings parallel multi-agent testing, A/B comparison agents, and better skill trigger tuning across Claude.ai, Cowork, Claude Code, and the repo.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 17 · Apr 20–24
description:
2026-05-04

Claude Code launches ultrareview, session recaps, custom themes, and a redesigned web UI with a sessions sidebar and drag-and-drop layout.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 17 · April 20–24, 2026
description:
2026-05-04

Claude Code releases a major update with Ultrareview research preview, automatic session recaps, custom plugin themes, and a redesigned web experience. It also improves terminal workflows, settings persistence, hooks, multi-host PR support, and faster large-session resume.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Claude Opus 4.7 with the new xhigh effort level, Routines on Claude Code on the web, /ultrareview cloud code review, a /usage breakdown that shows what’s driving your limits, and native binaries replacing the bundled JavaScript.
description:
2026-05-04

Claude Code ships a major update with Claude Opus 4.7 as the default for Max and Team Premium, new xhigh effort controls, scheduled cloud routines, richer usage insights, and Ultrareview v2.1.111. It also adds native binaries, auto mode, recap, improved TUI, and stronger permissions.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 15 · April 6–10, 2026
description:
2026-05-04

Claude Code adds Ultraplan cloud planning, a new Monitor tool with self-pacing /loop, /team-onboarding setup guides, and /autofix-pr from the terminal. It also brings richer web and CLI workflows, fresh setup wizards, improved permissions, and several usability upgrades.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 14 · March 30 – April 3, 2026
description:
2026-05-04

Claude Code adds computer use in the CLI, interactive in-product lessons, flicker-free rendering, per-tool MCP result-size overrides, and plugin executables on PATH. It also ships permission and hook updates, better file editing, quieter thinking summaries, and broader voice and deep-link support.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 13 · March 23–27, 2026
description:
2026-05-04

Claude Code adds auto mode for hands-off permissions, built-in computer use, PR auto-fix in the cloud, transcript search, and a native PowerShell tool for Windows, plus hook, editor, and workflow improvements across desktop and web.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 17
description:
2026-05-02

Claude Code adds ultrareview, session recaps, custom themes, and a redesigned web experience with a new sessions sidebar.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Introducing Advanced Account Security
description:
2026-05-02

OpenAI introduces Advanced Account Security for ChatGPT, adding stronger phishing-resistant sign-in, tighter recovery controls, shorter sessions, login alerts, and automatic training exclusion. The new opt-in protection also extends to Codex and includes preferred Yubico security key bundles.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - AWS Transform now offers BI migration agents for Power BI and Tableau to Amazon Quick
description:
2026-05-01

Amazon Quicksight adds BI migration agents in AWS Transform to convert Tableau and Power BI dashboards into Quicksight assets, helping reduce migration effort from months to days. The agents assess readiness, rebuild dashboard elements, and run entirely within your AWS account.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - AWS Transform now offers BI migration agents for Power BI and Tableau to Amazon Quick
description:
2026-05-01

Amazon Quicksight adds BI migration agents that convert Tableau and Power BI dashboards into Quick Sight assets, helping teams cut migration effort from months to days and move faster with Amazon QuickSight’s AI-powered workflows.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick adds Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint extensions and updates the Word extension (Preview)
description:
2026-05-01

Amazon Quicksight introduces new and upgraded Microsoft 365 extensions in preview for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word, bringing AI-powered tasks directly into users’ Microsoft 365 workflows for analysis, presentations, document editing, and review.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick Adds Custom Sort for Filter Controls
description:
2026-05-01

Amazon Quicksight adds custom sort for filter controls, giving authors control over dropdown and list value order. They can now sort by business logic, related metrics, or manual order so the most relevant options appear first across supported regions.

title: Amazon: Amazon Web Services - Top announcements of the What’s Next with AWS, 2026
description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Web Services expands its AI lineup with Amazon Quick updates, new Amazon Connect agentic AI solutions, and a broader partnership with OpenAI. Quick adds a desktop app preview, new Free and Plus plans, visual asset generation, and more app integrations, while Bedrock gains new OpenAI model and agent previews.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Start using Amazon Quick for free in minutes with Free and Plus pricing plans
description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Quicksight adds new Free and Plus pricing plans for Amazon Quick, letting users sign up with personal email or existing Google, Apple, Github, or Amazon credentials without an AWS account. It also brings guided onboarding and role-specific workflows, with Professional and Enterprise plans for more capabilities.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Build custom applications using natural language in Amazon Quick (Preview)
description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Quicksight announces preview features for Amazon Quick that let users create custom web applications in minutes with natural language, no coding required. The new capability connects live data, supports workflows and AI-powered features, and lets teams publish and share apps in one click.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick expands integrations to include Google Workspace, Zoom, Airtable, and more
description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Quicksight expands integrations with 13 new built-in action connectors and managed authentication, letting users securely connect accounts in a few clicks and take action across popular work tools from one place.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports document and visual creation in chat
description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Quicksight adds document and visual creation in chat, letting users draft polished documents, presentations, spreadsheets, images, charts, and infographics with natural language and export them to common file formats. Visual creation is in preview, while document creation is broadly available.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now available as a desktop application for macOS and Windows (Preview)
description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Quicksight adds a native desktop app preview for macOS and Windows, extending Quick beyond the browser with local file access, OS-level notifications, native desktop control, shared memory and knowledge graph, and MCP support for coding agents.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
description:
2026-04-28

OpenAI launches GPT-5.5 and other frontier models on Amazon Bedrock, brings Codex to AWS, and adds Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI, giving enterprises new ways to build and deploy AI in trusted AWS environments with security, governance, and workflows they already use.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Claude for Creative Work
description:
2026-04-28

Anthropic expands Claude for creative work with new connectors for Blender, Adobe, Autodesk, Ableton, Splice, and more, bringing natural-language help, workflow automation, and cross-tool handoff to creative teams. It also introduces Claude Design for rapid idea exploration and export.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now integrates with Visier’s Vee agent for workforce intelligence
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds Visier’s Vee AI assistant through MCP, bringing governed workforce intelligence into the Quick workspace. Users can ask natural-language questions, run recurring workforce reviews with Quick Flows, and combine Visier answers with enterprise knowledge in Quick Spaces.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports multiple owners for admin-managed SharePoint and Google Drive knowledge bases
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds co-owner sharing for knowledge bases and data source connections, expanding collaboration for admin-managed SharePoint Online and Google Drive integrations with Owner and Viewer roles across supported AWS Regions.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports permission verification for ACL-enabled knowledge bases
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds ACL verification for knowledge bases, helping administrators check whether a user can access a specific document and quickly troubleshoot permissions. The new Permission Checker shows access details and visible users and groups for ACL-enabled content.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick Automate announces shared file storage for automations
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds in-app file storage for Quick Automate, letting users upload, download, and share files across automations in the same group without external storage or connectors. It streamlines file handling for workflows, lookups, configuration files, and reporting.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick Automate now supports import and export of automations across AWS accounts
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quick Automate adds automation version migration across automation groups, AWS accounts, and AWS Regions, making it easier to promote tested workflows, share proven automations, and support multi-environment deployments with secure encrypted export links.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports multi-account sign-in within the same browser
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds multi-session support for Amazon Quick, letting customers sign in to up to five accounts at once in the same browser. It also adds account names to URLs and makes it easier to switch, manage, and log out across sessions.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports document-level access controls for Google Drive knowledge bases
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds document-level access controls for Google Drive knowledge bases, helping organizations preserve native Drive permissions while indexing content and checking live access rights at query time for more accurate responses.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick now supports document-level access controls for ACL support for S3
description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds document-level access control lists for Amazon S3 knowledge bases, giving teams granular control over which users and groups can access specific documents or folders and improving secure permission management.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - How we built our multi-agent research system
description:
2026-04-23

Anthropic introduces Research, a multi-agent Claude capability that searches the web, Google Workspace, and integrations to tackle complex tasks. The post also shares how Anthropic built it, with lessons on orchestration, prompting, parallel search, citations, and production reliability.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop
description:
2026-04-23

Anthropic introduces Desktop Extensions for Claude Desktop, making MCP server installs as easy as one click. It also adds the .mcpb bundle format, a built-in extensions directory, automatic updates, and open-sources the spec and toolchain.
